articles.title: Driver dies and 33 people seriously injured in Bedford train crash
articles.description: The crash, which happened at about 17:15 BST on Friday, has left almost 90 people hurt.

articles.title: 'People flew from their seats': Passengers describe how collision unfolded
articles.description: The East of England Ambulance Service says nearly 90 people have been injured -over 30 of them seriously.

articles.title: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
articles.description: The BBC has been told that the transport secretary is among those advising Starmer to set out a timetable.

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
articles.description: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.
